steps.title: Use slope intercept form
steps.content:
A line with slope $m$ and y-intercept $b$ has equation:
$$
y=mx+b
$$
The slope is $6$, and the point $(0,4)$ gives the y-intercept $4$.

steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content: Substitute $m=6$ and $b=4$: $$ y=6x+4 $$ The answer is C.
